cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, sir. I need to talk to someone about something personal. I'm going through a tough time.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm here to listen, Chaitanya ji. What seems to be the matter? You can share with me.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, it's just that I had a big argument with my family and I'm feeling really down. I don't know how to handle it, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I understand, Chaitanya. Family issues can be very stressful. Have you tried talking to them about how you feel?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, I tried, but it didn't work out. That's why I'm feeling so frustrated and alone, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Sometimes, taking a break and giving each other space can help. Would you like some advice on how to approach the situation?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, please tell me. I really need some guidance right now.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, Chaitanya. Why don't you try writing down your feelings and concerns, and then have a calm conversation with your family about it?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 93s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A person calls their friend to tell them about a personal crisis (e.g., a breakup, a family argument) and seeks emotional support.
